title: Connect with Instagram
name: Instagram
description: Connect your Instagram Business account to start using the Instagram API
authDescription: Connect your account to access Instagram pages
selectPageDescription: Choose the page that will be connected to Instagram
channelConfigDescription: Define a name to identify this channel

warnings.notConfiguredDescription: The INSTAGRAM_APP_ID configuration was not found. Please contact your system administrator.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Inbox Detected - Instagram
duplicate.description: We detected multiple inboxes for the same Instagram account. This can cause problems with message delivery.

errors.authorizationFailed: Error connecting to Instagram. Please check your settings.

instructions.redirect: You will be redirected to Instagram to authorize the connection
instructions.businessAccount: Make sure your account is an Instagram Business account

callback.errorMissingCode: Authorization code or state not received
callback.closeMessage: You can close this page and try again.
callback.footer: Please wait while we process your Instagram authorization.
